judge: Claude-Code-as-judge, 4 independent judges grouped by vagueness band
caveats: The LLM user-simulator answered VERBOSELY and volunteered details (repo names, topics, destinations) the build never asked for. This MASKS under-asking: a terse real user would score the build lower on asked_before_assuming and convergence. These numbers are an optimistic upper bound.

no_wrong_assumptions == 3 is VACUOUS for sales-vague / research-vague / workflow-overloaded: they produced zero capabilities, so there was nothing to assume with. Their weighted totals are inflated by this hollow pass.
One simulator call errored (research-vague R4, claude exit 1), truncating that exchange.
emails-vague ran under the pre-fix driver, which mislabelled a mid-flight wall-clock timeout as a hang; its phase actually reached draft_ready.

fixtures.notes: Converged perfectly but destroyed the zero-question fast-path: 4 serial gratuitous questions (format, memory, review, storage) all had obvious safe defaults.
Skipped BOTH genuinely-missing identifiers (which repo, which Slack channel) yet still spent 3 serial rounds on gratuitous questions. Asks the wrong things.
Best total. Correct twice-weekly cron (Mon/Thu), no invented destination. Topic focus never directly asked; 5 serial rounds.

Best single question in the suite (R1 batched tools + direction with an escape hatch); correctly kept sync one-way. But drifted to web_fetch + execute_sql with NO Notion connector despite the user naming Notion.

Never targeted ANY of the three ambiguities; repo + destination surfaced only because the simulator volunteered them. Dropped the bug/security label filter that DEFINES 'important' — would alert on every issue. Trigger correctly stayed event-based.

HARD FAIL on assumptions. Despite eliciting Notion, it invented a second capability 'Publish to Team Channel' hinting `discord` — a chat destination the user never confirmed. Fell into the trap with Discord standing in for Slack.

Exhausted the 900s budget after 4 serial rounds, still needing a 5th question. Zero capabilities. Never asked the Closed-Won trigger or which CRM. R1 was the strongest single question across the high band.
Reached draft_ready with NO agent_ir — an EMPTY persona. Asked the same memory template question twice (for two different capabilities) while never asking topic, cadence, or destination.

HARD FAIL on assumptions: baked gmail_search into both capabilities without ever asking the provider. Correctly asked the auto-send safety gate (answered 'always review'). Missed 2 of 4 true-intent jobs (label urgent, draft replies) and invented a Google Drive destination.
Worst outcome. Hard-failed in 34s with ZERO questions, zero resolved cells, and NO error message, on the intent that most needed a narrowing question.

aggregate.efficiency_round_cap: 0 or 1 on ALL 10 fixtures — never once within the design's round cap
